examples: Catholics pray to Mary as an intercessor.
If it is done both of us have to name intercessor, it is too troubled.
Conviction of sin fastened upon him; he saw himself, without an intercessor, in the presence of a holy and just Judge.
After many years of mistrust and suspicion and violence, there must be an intercessor that will guarantee both sides that what ever is agreed is going to be executed.
